footer_eco_notice: This website was designed and developed following sustainable web principles. Loading this page transferred {size} of data, generating about {co2} of C02.
toast_update_available: A new version of the site is available.
site_description: A low-carbon Generative AI toolkit for creative and media teams — estimate, compare, and reduce the environmental footprint of your GenAI workflows.
desc_home: Understand, measure, and reduce the environmental impact of generative AI in film and television production with the DGC Green toolkit.
desc_about: Learn about the DGC Green Low-Carbon GenAI Toolkit — our methodology, partners, and mission to help screen creators use AI more responsibly.
desc_calculator: Estimate the energy use and carbon emissions of your generative AI tasks — text, image, audio, and video — with a transparent, LCA-based calculator.
desc_facts: Key facts and data on the environmental impact of generative AI in the screen sector, from data centres to everyday creative and production workflows.
desc_faq: Answers to common questions about the environmental impact of generative AI in film, television, and creative production, and how to use AI more consciously.
desc_glossary: A plain-language glossary of generative AI and sustainability terms, helping screen creators decode the environmental impact of AI in production.
desc_guide: Practical best practices for using generative AI responsibly in screen production — reduce environmental impact without compromising creative integrity.
title_calculator: Emissions Calculator | GenAI Toolkit | DGC Green
calc_q_iterations: How many times did you give a prompt?
calc_q_pages_input: How many pages are in the original document?
calc_q_reasoning: Did the model need to use reasoning?
calc_q_image_resolution: What is the resolution of the image?
calc_q_audio_duration: What is the duration of the generated audio, in seconds?
calc_q_video_duration: What is the duration of the generated video, in seconds?
calc_q_provider: What AI provider did you use?
calc_q_images_per_prompt: How many images were generated for each prompt?
calc_q_tokens_per_page: How many tokens were consumed per page?
calc_q_output_pages: How many pages did the model generate?
calc_q_video_quality: What is the quality of the generated video?
calc_q_video_fps: How many frames per second is the generated video?
explore_practices_description: Make informed choices throughout your workflows
explore_calculator_description: Estimate and compare your AI use
calc_reasoning_tooltip: Enabling reasoning mode (often referred to as “Pro” or “Thinking” mode) allows the model to simulate a thought process that enables it to break down a complex problem step by step.
calc_heading: What does your GenAI task cost?
calc_select_prompt: Select what you want to generate:
